# CLI delivery 側の責務分離 — composition root と primary adapter への分解

## Tasks (24/26 resolved)

### S1 — D8 Prep: Telemetry Usecase Service + Infrastructure Adapter

> Establish the usecase telemetry service (`ArchivedTrackTelemetryService` / `ArchivedTrackTelemetryInteractor`), its secondary port `ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort`, and the infrastructure adapter `FsArchivedTrackTelemetryAdapter` that abstracts `std::fs` / `serde_json` / `chrono::Utc::now()` I/O. This must be done before the cli-bin I/O removal (T009) and before cli-driver migration, as the telemetry path is a D8 prerequisite.

- [x] **T001**: D8 telemetry usecase service + infrastructure adapter: Add `usecase::telemetry` module with `ArchivedTrackTelemetryCommand`, `ArchivedTrackTelemetryError`, `ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort` secondary port, `ArchivedTrackTelemetryService` application-service trait, and `ArchivedTrackTelemetryInteractor` implementing the service. The interactor holds an injected `Arc<dyn ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort>` and delegates persistence through that port so cli_driver invokes a usecase service, not an infrastructure adapter. Add `infrastructure::telemetry::archived_track::FsArchivedTrackTelemetryAdapter` struct implementing `ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort` using `std::fs`, `serde_json`, and `chrono::Utc::now()`; constructor `new(telemetry_dir: PathBuf) -> Self` stores `telemetry_dir` in a private field used by `emit`. Re-export the usecase service/port types and infrastructure adapter from their respective crate roots. Unit tests: service delegates to the port; adapter `emit` writes a well-formed JSONL line; `Io` variant propagates on fs failure; `Serialize` variant propagates on serialization failure. This is a prerequisite for D8 cli-bin I/O removal (T009). Estimated diff: ~220 lines. (`d10b1df3464bedc0e5bc9c289a73de3c54c1266b`)

### S2 — D7 Adapter Cleanup: 6 Relocations + LazyBranchReader Elimination (re-export shim)

> Resolve the 7 adapter-outside-infrastructure findings in three priority groups. Six port-implementing adapter structs move from `apps/cli-composition` to `libs/infrastructure`; `LazyBranchReader` is eliminated by resolving the UFCS ambiguity and using the existing infrastructure `SystemGitRepo` path. Each relocation group adds a `pub(crate) use infrastructure::...` re-export shim in `cli_composition` so that existing wiring continues to compile. The shims are removed in S10/T024 after the live driver cutover.
> Group A (T002, high): FsReviewGateStateAdapter + FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter.
> Group B (T003, medium): RecordingDryAgent + NullInsertIndexProxy (+ PersistentIndexLock prerequisite).
> Group C (T004, low + LazyBranchReader elimination): NoopSemanticIndexPort + NoOpDryApprovalService + LazyBranchReader removal + UFCS resolution at call site.

- [x] **T002**: D7 adapter relocation Group A (high priority, re-export shim): Relocate `FsReviewGateStateAdapter` and `FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter` from `apps/cli-composition/src/track/fixpoint_resolve.rs` to `libs/infrastructure/src/track/gate_state.rs`. Add `impl ReviewGateStatePort for FsReviewGateStateAdapter` and `impl RefVerifyGateStatePort for FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter`. In `cli_composition`, replace the struct definitions with `pub(crate) use infrastructure::track::gate_state::{FsReviewGateStateAdapter, FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter}` re-export shims so that existing wiring in `cli_composition` compiles without change. Unit tests for each adapter (happy path + fs error). Estimated diff: ~200 lines. (`13c52a64eb4815865c56de4ece96bfcc55221301`)
- [x] **T003**: D7 adapter relocation Group B (medium priority, re-export shim): Relocate `RecordingDryAgent` from `apps/cli-composition/src/dry/tier_telemetry.rs` and `NullInsertIndexProxy` (plus `PersistentIndexLock`) from `apps/cli-composition/src/dry/persistent_index.rs` to `libs/infrastructure/src/dry_check/recording_agent.rs` and `libs/infrastructure/src/semantic_dup/null_insert_proxy.rs` respectively. `NullInsertIndexProxy::new()` takes the `LanceDbSemanticIndexAdapter` and `PersistentIndexLock` as private fields. Add shim re-exports in `cli_composition` so that the composition wiring continues to compile. Unit/integration tests: `RecordingDryAgent` delegates `judge()` to inner and records telemetry; `NullInsertIndexProxy` suppresses insert but delegates search/delete. Estimated diff: ~250 lines. (`4b6f8bf62cf37a1ec4768b3cad6e52308dc30806`)
- [x] **T004**: D7 adapter relocation Group C (low priority + LazyBranchReader elimination, re-export shim): Relocate `NoopSemanticIndexPort` from `apps/cli-composition/src/semantic_dup/measure_quality.rs` to `libs/infrastructure/src/semantic_dup/noop_adapter.rs` and `NoOpDryApprovalService` from `apps/cli-composition/src/track/fixpoint_resolve.rs` to `libs/infrastructure/src/dry_check/noop_approval.rs`. Add re-export shims in `cli_composition`. Remove `LazyBranchReader` from `apps/cli-composition/src/track/mod.rs` (lines 101-113) and resolve the UFCS ambiguity at the call site by using a concrete `infrastructure::git_cli::SystemGitRepo` reference instead of the trait-object detour. Verify that `infrastructure::git_cli::SystemGitRepo` already `impl BranchReaderPort`; add the impl if missing. CI must stay green after this commit. Estimated diff: ~180 lines (including removals). ### S3 — D4 Orchestration to usecase: Application Services and Pipeline Extraction

> Extract multi-step orchestration and business sequencing logic from `cli_composition` into usecase application services. Four tasks cover: (1) SignalGate chain-sequencing interactor, (2) SpecAdrSignal read-evaluate-write interactor + FsSpecFileWriterAdapter, (3) diff-fragment pipeline for fixpoint build_current_fragment_refs, (4) fixpoint_resolve dry-gate conditional + PR polling loop.
> Each extraction may add a temporary delegation shim in `cli_composition` so the command path stays compilable. S10/T024 removes those D4 shims after the live driver cutover. CN-07 is enforced: driving adapters must not carry multi-step orchestration.

- [x] **T005**: D4 orchestration to usecase — SignalGate application service: Add `usecase::signal_gate` module with `SignalGateCommand`, `SignalGateOutput`, `SignalChainOutput`, `SignalGateError`, `SignalGateService` trait, and `SignalGateInteractor` struct (implementing `SignalGateService`). `SignalGateInteractor::new()` takes the injected `SignalLayerReader` port, `SignalGateMatrix` strictness source, and the three chain-runner ports (`AdrChainRunnerPort`, `SpecAdrChainRunnerPort`, `LayerChainRunnerPort`). The interactor sequences the 4 SoT chains (adr-user, spec-adr, catalog-spec, impl-catalog), resolves strictness per gate matrix, and aggregates results into `SignalGateOutput`. This extracts the multi-step orchestration currently in `apps/cli-composition/src/signal.rs:437-567` (`signal_check_gate`). After adding the interactor, add a re-export shim in `cli_composition::signal` that delegates to the new usecase service. Unit tests: `run_gate` sequences all 4 chains; failed chain propagates to `SignalGateError::ChainExecutionFailed`; `passed` field reflects aggregate result. Estimated diff: ~280 lines. (`08a52fd2`)
- [x] **T006**: D4 orchestration to usecase — SpecAdrSignal application service + FsSpecFileWriterAdapter: Add `usecase::spec_adr_signal` module with `SpecAdrSignalCommand`, `SpecAdrSignalOutput`, `SpecAdrSignalError`, `SpecFileWriterPort` trait (read_spec_json / write_spec_json), `SpecAdrSignalService` trait, and `SpecAdrSignalInteractor` implementing `SpecAdrSignalService`. The interactor runs the read-domain-document→evaluate→set→write-domain-document cycle currently in `apps/cli-composition/src/signal.rs:167-194` (`signal_calc_spec_adr`); JSON decode/encode stays behind `SpecFileWriterPort`. Add `infrastructure::spec::writer::FsSpecFileWriterAdapter` implementing `SpecFileWriterPort` using `std::fs::read_to_string`, the spec codec, and `atomic_write_file`. Wire a re-export shim in `cli_composition::signal` delegating `signal_calc_spec_adr` to the new interactor. Unit tests: `calc_and_persist` calls read/evaluate/write in order; `SpecAdrSignalError::Read` propagates on fs failure; `Decode`, `Encode`, and `Write` propagate from the adapter boundary. Estimated diff: ~260 lines. (`107763afc526408aae034bca0cb061758471cf5a`)
- [x] **T007**: D4 orchestration to usecase — diff-fragment pipeline for fixpoint dry gate: Add `usecase::dry_check::fragment_pipeline` with `DryFragmentPipelineCommand`, `DryFragmentPipelineOutput`, `DryFragmentPipelineService`, and `DryFragmentPipelineInteractor`, using the shared `usecase::d4_orchestration::D4OrchestrationError` error type. Extract `build_current_fragment_refs` (lines 214-291 of `apps/cli-composition/src/track/fixpoint_resolve.rs`) into that usecase application service. In T007, `dry_check_approved` continues to derive `current_fragment_refs` inline in `apps/cli-composition/src/dry.rs`; its broader dry-gate extraction is tracked by T008. The diff-fragment pipeline (git hunk listing → fragment extraction → path normalization → changed-path filter → overlap → ref derivation) is a multi-step business sequence owned by the interactor. The metrics aggregation logic in `dry_write` (records_before / records_after / records_appended) stays in the dry-write path; any `records_*` fields on `DryFragmentPipelineOutput` are compatibility counters fixed at 0 for this extraction. Update the `cli_composition` fixpoint call site to delegate to `DryFragmentPipelineService`. Keep re-export/delegation shims in `cli_composition` for now so CI stays green. Unit tests for the extracted pipeline with mocked ports. Estimated diff: ~350 lines. (`59b4eb2786612a5598c7441c2266c370cf2a7f77`)
- [x] **T008**: D4 orchestration to usecase — fixpoint_resolve dry-gate conditional and PR polling loop: Add `FixpointDryGateCommand`, `FixpointDryGateOutput`, `FixpointDryGateService`, and `FixpointDryGateInteractor` in `usecase::fixpoint_resolve`; add `PrReviewPollingCommand`, `PrReviewPollingOutput`, `PrReviewPollingService`, and `PrReviewPollingInteractor` in `usecase::pr_review`; both services share `usecase::d4_orchestration::D4OrchestrationError`. Extract the large `if usecase_dry_config.enabled { ... } else { ... }` block in `CliApp::fixpoint_resolve` (lines 428-518 of `apps/cli-composition/src/track/fixpoint_resolve.rs`) to `FixpointDryGateService`, which owns the dry-gate branching, corpus-root manifest branching, and `DryCheckApprovalInteractor` construction through explicit `repo_root` inputs and injected ports. The process-global CWD guard remains in the `cli_composition` caller around service invocation. Extract the PR review polling loop (lines 248-396 of `apps/cli-composition/src/pr/poll.rs`) to `PrReviewPollingService`. For both extractions, replace `cli_composition` sites with delegation to the new usecase services plus temporary delegation shims. Unit tests: dry-gate enabled/disabled paths; polling loop exits on review found; timeout path; retry path. Estimated diff: ~400 lines. (`bb81babf85f9fd666f511733ef4879628f093021`)

### S5 — D2 typed CompositionError + CliApp God-Facade Dissolution

> Introduce typed `CompositionError` (T010) and convert all 51 public `CliApp` methods from `Result<CommandOutcome, String>` to `Result<CommandOutcome, CompositionError>`.
> Dissolve the `CliApp` god-facade into bounded-context per-context `CompositionRoot` structs in three groups by command family (T011: track/arch/domain/file/conventions/demo; T012: guard/hook/git/verify/ref_verify/signal/telemetry; T013: dry/pr/review_v2/semantic_dup). Each `CompositionRoot` holds injected adapter fields. `pub struct CliApp;` is removed once all families are migrated.

- [x] **T010**: D2 typed CompositionError introduction: Add `pub enum CompositionError` in `apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs` (or `apps/cli-composition/src/error.rs`) covering the construction/wiring failure categories (e.g. `ConfigLoad(String)`, `AdapterInit(String)`, `WiringFailed(String)`) with `Display + Error` impls. Change all public `CliApp` method signatures from `Result<CommandOutcome, String>` to `Result<CommandOutcome, CompositionError>`. Convert all internal `Err(format!(...))` / `.map_err(|e| format!(...))` error-string sites to typed `CompositionError` variants. Update the `apps/cli/src/main.rs` call sites to handle `CompositionError` (pattern-match or `.to_string()` for the exit path). The 51 methods across 27 files all return the typed error; no `String`-returning public method remains. Estimated diff: ~400 lines (signature changes + variant conversions). (`c2a23b0045e4f19f767f61f7e06887cb29b3afb5`)

### S8 — D1/D6 Final Flip Commit: architecture-rules.json + dependency graph

> Atomic commit materializing the staged `cli_driver` source as a crate: create its Cargo manifest, add the workspace member, update `architecture-rules.json`, and update Cargo/deny dependency policy for the new layer. Verify `cargo make check-layers` + `cargo make deny` pass. Confirm AC-04 (`CliApp` absent), AC-05 (no `Result<_, String>`), AC-09 (six adapters relocated and LazyBranchReader removed via UFCS/SystemGitRepo cleanup), and AC-12 (arch-rules updated). The intended live composition/bin wiring cutover and old render-helper/shim removal were deferred to S10; AC-03, AC-06, and AC-08 are therefore completed by S10/T023-T025 rather than by T021. Later removal of unused direct Cargo deps is tracked separately and does not introduce new layer/crate edges.

AC-06 and AC-08 are satisfied only after this section.

- [~] **T023**: D1/D6 Driver::handle wiring cutover (the T021 sub-step (5) work I incorrectly deferred). For every cli_driver family (arch, conventions, demo, domain, dry, file, git, guard, hook, pr, ref_verify, review, semantic_dup, signal, telemetry, track, verify — 17 families, plus the lib root; dry includes the catalogued `dry_fix_local` entrypoint formerly backed by DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot): (a) cli_driver::*Driver::handle is rewritten to call the appropriate injected usecase-owned object (application-service/command-service trait, or a usecase interactor wrapping an existing secondary-port contract where T023 has not split the traits yet) and render the result to CommandOutcome — no more stubs and no direct infrastructure imports. For simple pass-through families, introduce or reuse a minimal usecase interactor/service that delegates to the secondary port; if the existing source still uses the same trait for the filesystem adapter and wrapper, keep that catalogue entry classified as SecondaryPort rather than ApplicationService until a distinct driver-facing trait is introduced. During this cutover, catalogue any transitional usecase presentation helpers discovered on the live driver path without making their removal a T023 completion criterion; T024 removes the actual usecase presentation helper (`usecase::telemetry::format_report`) so telemetry reporting returns `TelemetryReportOutput` DTO to cli_driver; note that `ArchPort.render_*` methods are secondary ports fulfilled by infrastructure (architecture inspection rendering) and are not presentation helpers — they are intentionally kept as `Result<String, ArchPortError>` and are not in scope for removal; (b) cli_composition::*CompositionRoot grows a `<name>_driver()` factory that constructs the infrastructure adapters and any interactor needed, returning a Driver ready to call; for dry and semantic_dup, this cutover also replaces any bridge-style DryDriverPort/SemanticDupDriverPort delegation to DryCompositionRoot / DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot / SemanticDupCompositionRoot with the usecase-owned service path or removes the port indirection before T024; (c) every apps/cli call site is flipped from `*CompositionRoot::new().<method>(args)` to `*CompositionRoot::new().<name>_driver().handle(<Name>Input::Variant { args })`; (d) #[allow(dead_code)] annotations on cli_driver stub helpers are removed. CI must stay green at each family boundary — split into per-family commits if needed, but keep the cutover internally atomic per family. Estimated diff: ~3000+ lines across the driver files, composition root files, and ~50 apps/cli call sites.
- [x] **T024**: Remove the cli_composition originals + shims and the T023-catalogued transitional usecase presentation helpers that T021 sub-step (6) was supposed to remove. T024 was done incrementally alongside T023 on a per-family basis (each family's T023 wiring cutover was immediately followed by T024 cleanup for that family), so T024 completes before T023's full scope is finalized. The live path for all T024-cleaned families now runs through cli_driver; the dry driver service (including the `dry_fix_local` entrypoint formerly backed by DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot) plus semantic_dup driver service no longer delegate back to DryCompositionRoot / DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot / SemanticDupCompositionRoot, so: (a) delete the render-helper duplicates and old command originals from apps/cli-composition/src/{arch,conventions,demo,domain,dry,...}.rs (rendering lives in cli_driver now; command business paths live in usecase/infrastructure behind catalogued ports); (b) remove the one actual usecase presentation helper: `usecase::telemetry::format_report` (a pure string-formatter living in the usecase layer) is deleted; `TelemetryAggregateService::report` is confirmed to return `TelemetryReportOutput` (a DTO) as of T026, so cli_driver owns final telemetry rendering; `ArchPort.render_*` methods remain as `Result<String, ArchPortError>` by design — `ArchPort` is a secondary port that infrastructure fulfills for architecture inspection, not a usecase presentation helper; (c) delete the D8 telemetry composition shim `telemetry_emit_archived_track_subcommand` from apps/cli-composition/src/telemetry.rs; (d) delete the infrastructure re-export shim `pub use infrastructure::codex_common::tee_stderr_to_file;` from apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs; if stderr teeing is still needed, keep ownership behind a usecase-facing service/port with infrastructure providing the helper and cli_composition wiring it into the driver, so neither cli_driver nor apps/cli imports infrastructure directly; (e) audit and remove any remaining D4 (T005-T008 era) delegation shims that no longer have callers. CI must stay green. Estimated diff: removal of ~2000+ lines. (`f28fd490`)
- [~] **T025**: Bin business-logic extraction (cli.md thin-bin policy compliance). `apps/cli/src/commands/pr.rs` has chrono + serde_json business logic for PR review polling/parsing (~300 lines: DateTime parsing, JSON value walking, body filtering). `apps/cli/src/commands/verify_catalogue_spec_refs.rs` builds JSON rules via serde_json::json!({...}). Both violate the thin-bin policy. Action: move these into existing or new usecase application services (e.g., extend the catalogued usecase::pr::PrCommandService / PrCommandInteractor poll_review path for the polling/parsing logic; usecase or infrastructure side for the verify-rules JSON construction), wire them through the matching cli_driver Driver::handle paths, and remove the now-dead `chrono` + `serde_json` direct deps from apps/cli/Cargo.toml. Estimated diff: ~400 lines.
- [x] **T026**: D9 typed-error refactor for track-touched scope (IN-13/IN-14/IN-15). Replace string-based error returns with `thiserror`-derived typed errors across the usecase / infrastructure / cli_composition / cli_driver / cli layers touched by this track. Add new usecase typed errors (PrGhApiError, ChainRunnerError + ExecutionFailed variant, ShellParserError, SchemaExporterError, DiffBaseResolverError, DryCorpusMetaError, CodeFragmentExtractorError, ReviewAuxError, GitWorkflowError Unavailable variant, TelemetryEmitDynamicPortError + TelemetryAggregateServiceError + ReportUnavailable, ReviewRoundTypeError, ReviewWorkflowError variant) and infrastructure typed errors (DemoRunError, TrackBranchError, PersistentIndexLockError). Update adapter impls to construct typed error variants via map_err chains; update tests to use `.to_string().contains(...)` to remain compatible with typed Display impls. Register all new pub items in usecase-types.json / infrastructure-types.json so `signal check-impl-catalog` passes. Estimated diff: ~1500 lines across libs/usecase, libs/infrastructure, apps/cli-composition, apps/cli, and catalogue files. (`a7143f4db08bcb5961c127fa7da13179d0a52392`)
